item.description:
# Shruti 1.1.3
- Moves Shruti to the same dependable public release system as GrabIt: a dedicated website, versioned installer, and signed in-app update feed published together. - Checks for updates quietly on launch and every six hours, then shows the standard in-app update notification when a newer tested build is available. - Adds permanent core-level guards so MainStage, ARK audio routing, and Shruti's own processes can never be captured into a feedback loop. - Repairs older saved MainStage protection entries automatically and blocks smart features from force-engaging protected audio hosts. - Keeps the wider, cleaner mixer and settings layout introduced in 1.1.2.
